name: His Majesty's Eminence
description: Notes This item is a slightly weaker version of The Forgotten Crown, granting 10 less HP and 1 less ATT/DEX. It was available as the final reward for the Shattered Kingdom event, obtained by completing the Loremaster quest for The Tinkerer by giving him the 4 tomes compiled from the 20 pages dropped during the event.
